# GB Album Player

Streaming music player for Glenn Bennett's original music catalog at music.glennbennett.com. The dedicated listening experience for fans — the Glenn Bennett website links here for album playback.

## Key Features

<!-- macman:features -->
> **GENERATED BY MACMAN** — Do not edit. Update in [macman](http://macman.test) and regenerate.

- **Album browsing** — cover art, track listings, and song metadata
- **HTML5 Audio streaming** — from Bunny CDN with origin fallback
- **Device-based favorites** — fans favorite songs/albums without accounts (tracked by User-Agent + IP fingerprint)
- **Play tracking** — records every play per song per device for listening statistics
- **Playback modes** — shuffle with queue management, repeat (off/all/one), 2-second gap between tracks
- **Media Session API** — integrates with system media controls (lock screen, Bluetooth, AirPlay)
- **PWA support** — installable web app via manifest.json
- **Admin panel** — content management, device tracking, play statistics
- **REST API** — albums, songs, search, play recording, favorite toggling
- **Shared data** — Glenn Bennett website reads from this app's SQLite database for homepage featured tracks
<!-- /macman:features -->

## Deployment

<!-- macman:deployment -->
> **GENERATED BY MACMAN** — Do not edit. Update in [macman](http://macman.test) and regenerate.

```bash
lftp music -e "mirror --reverse --exclude-glob-from ~/.lftp/exclude-list . ."
```
<!-- /macman:deployment -->

## File Structure

```
application/
  controllers/    — Player, Admin, API controllers
  models/         — Album_model, Song_model, Device_model, etc.
  views/          — Player, admin views
  core/           — MY_Controller, MY_Model
assets/
  js/music-player.js  — Player JavaScript class
  css/music-player.css
```
